title: lastila hirsuta
intro: Lastila hirsuta, also known as the hairy lastila, is a type of plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Lastila hirsuta include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, Lastila hirsuta is often used as a tea or tincture, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in supplements and remedies.
intro_study: According to "Biomedicine & pharmacotherapy = Biomedecine & pharmacotherapie", lastila hirsuta, also known as Mansoa hirsuta, has anti-inflammatory and analgesic potential without causing acute or subchronic toxic effects.
